title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Hungama 2
subTitle: Vani, Aakash's former lover, returns to him and reveals that he is the father of her child. However, things go awry when he rejects her claim and seeks help from his colleague Anjali.

title: Phir Ek Maidan E Jung
subTitle: When rival gang members are killed mysteriously, the police begin an investigation. Later, their probe leads them to a physician who is seeking retribution.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Bal Ganesh And Friends From Zeba V- 2018
subTitle: Bal Ganesh and his devotees, Topi, Dhoti and Suit-Boot travel to the planet of Zeba, experiencing adventures and creating unforgettable memories.

title: Radha Krishna Prem Pariksha
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Kali Kitaab
subTitle: When narratives from a cryptic book spring to life, a woman experiences bizarre phenomena and resolves to uncover the identity of its enigmatic writer.

title: Saamrajya
subTitle: A policeman who remains deeply tormented by his sibling's mysterious vanishing, undertakes a secret assignment to penetrate a powerful underworld organisation. He realizes that the ruthless chieftain is a person from his previous life.

title: Housefull 5B
subTitle: After billionaire Ranjeet Dobriyal dies at a party on his luxury cruise ship, several fraudsters pretend to be his son in an attempt to inherit his estate.

title: Hanu Man
subTitle: A local thief, who lives in the village of Anjanadri, comes across a Hanuman-like power. He must protect people from the peril that looms over them.

title: Devara: Part 1
subTitle: A fierce sea warrior violently opposes his village's criminal activities, while years later, his gentle son charts his own course, creating a stark contrast in paths.

title: Ready
subTitle: A case of mistaken identities causes Prem and Sanjana to fall in love. Meanwhile, Sanjana's uncles try to get the money that she has inherited and Prem convinces them to marry her off to him.

title: Ready
subTitle: A case of mistaken identities causes Prem and Sanjana to fall in love. Meanwhile, Sanjana's uncles try to get the money that she has inherited and Prem convinces them to marry her off to him.

title: Krishna Aur Kans
subTitle: With his quick wit and valiant strength, Krishna outsmarts and defeats his evil uncle, King Kans, and the legion of demons he unleashes.

title: Veerappan
subTitle: Officer Kanan gathers a strike force of undercover operatives and police officers to hunt down the ruthless dacoit Veerappan and his dangerous crew.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Jhoothi
subTitle: Kalpana, a habitual liar, attempts to sabotage her sister's arranged marriage to a doctor, but complications arise when she develops feelings for him.

title: Made in China
subTitle: Raghuveer Mehta, a failing businessman, travels to China for some work. During the trip, he hatches a plan to sell an aphrodisiac that enhances men's sexual health in India.

title: Baaghi 3
subTitle: Ronnie and his brother Vikram enjoy a peaceful life in Agra. However, their world turns upside down when terrorists kidnap Vikram, prompting Ronnie to embark on a daring rescue mission.

title: Total Dhamaal
subTitle: In their desperate hunt for a hidden treasure, a group of oddballs must survive a series of cartoonish misadventures and hordes of quirky zoo animals.

title: Police Diary
subTitle: Police Diary

title: Chup Chup Ke
subTitle: A fisherman saves Jeetu from committing suicide, only to sell him to a moneylender. Jeetu is then forced to pose as a man with hearing and speech impairment, resulting in hilarious consequences.

title: Lootcase
subTitle: Nandan, a middle-class man, is chased by a gangster, a corrupt politician and a cop when he finds a suitcase full of money.

title: Chhaava
subTitle: Following the death of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, his son, the Maratha king Sambhaji, takes a stand against the brutal Mughal emperor, Aurangzeb, in a bid to protect his empire.

title: Chhaava
subTitle: Following the death of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, his son, the Maratha king Sambhaji, takes a stand against the brutal Mughal emperor, Aurangzeb, in a bid to protect his empire.

title: Panga
subTitle: Jaya, a former Kabaddi world champion, is pushed into making a comeback into the sport by her family. However, she first has to battle her internal conflicts and the expectations society has of her.

title: Khiladi Ki Jung
subTitle: Hari and Eeshwar are two soldiers fighting the Nazi forces during World War II. Hari has to sacrifice his love and life to make a mistrustful Eeshwar understand some facts about living in harmony.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: All Is Good
subTitle: Aravind and Divya separate soon after their wedding. But he tries to win his estranged wife back when she approaches him for divorce after three years of separation.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
subTitle: A brave thief fights to survive and claim his territory. However, he battles powerful enemies, aiming to become a leader without a real kingdom.

title: Rajini The Jailer
subTitle: A retired jailer lives a peaceful life with his family. But when his son, who is a policeman, goes missing and is supposedly killed, he is forced to go back to his world of crime and find the killer.

title: Chennai Express
subTitle: Rahul, a young man, sets out to immerse his late grandfather's ashes at Rameshwaram. However, when he helps Meena, a runaway bride, board a train, he has to face the ire of her criminal family.

title: Border
subTitle: A small battalion of Indian soldiers go up against a 2000 well-armed Pakistani strike force. They must defend their post all night until they receive assistance from the Indian Air Force.

title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Madhagaja
subTitle: The wife of one of two rival dons sends her son to a distant land to shield him from their relentless feud. However, the son, raised as an orphan, eventually returns to the brutal world of violence.
